# Moonday Live

> Luxury lunar guidance — personalized blueprints, daily forecasts, and rituals across Mind, Soul, and Body, attuned to the Great Cycle of the Moon. For entertainment and reflection.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Live lunar climate, current Moon phase, and an introduction to your Lunar Signature.
- [About](/about): The vision behind Moonday Live and its luxury lunar philosophy.
- [Lenses](/lenses): The astronomy engines and technical foundations that power Moonday's calculations.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free tier and the Sovereign Tier subscription — monthly and yearly plans.
- [Lunar Library](/library): Art Deco zodiac archive with deep guidance for each Moon sign.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers about Lunar Signatures, Sovereign Tier, billing, and cancellations.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Moonday Live team.

## Optional

- [Disclaimer](/disclaimer): Entertainment-only notice and scope of guidance.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How personal and birth data are handled.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of Moonday Live.
- [Refund Policy](/refund): Refund and cancellation terms for the Sovereign Tier.
